19:35:26.386 [main] DEBUG com.intuit.karate.Suite - [config] classpath:karate-config.js 19:35:27.909 [main] DEBUG com.intuit.karate - request: 1 > GET https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/login/john/demo 1 > Accept: application/json 1 > Host: parabank.parasoft.com 1 > Connection: Keep-Alive 1 > User-Agent: Apache-HttpClient/4.5.13 (Java/1.8.0_492) 1 > Accept-Encoding: gzip,deflate

testcase.name: [2:22] Intento de inicio de sesión con credenciales incorrectas (400)
